notes: First successful run. Original code — tags-based double-processing prevention, naive KB queries (bare keywords), regex-based URL extraction from Perplexity text body (always empty). Books used included irrelevant titles (Wim Hof, Animal Farm, 1984). Model: deepseek/deepseek-r1.

result.title: Spontaneous Trip with Battles and Ex-Wife
result.raw_text: I had so many dreams that I want to transcribe or like you know write down notes. There were many environments. One of them was in a car, one of them was in a new city, one of them was me fighting some people, but they were all connected actually. It was a part of a trip that I took with some people. And I know that my friend was there, but the other and my also my my ex-wife was there, and then someone else as well. The idea was to take a spontaneous trip somewhere, like you know, multiple locations where we'd stop every two days in a new location, some something like that, and we also ended up in a hotel at some point, but before we get to that, we started visiting some destinations, and during during that I got a notification from the university that my application or like a part of it that is regarding the scientific paper was a little bit suspicious, indicating that it was like written with some assistance of tools or something, and that it's not like completely believable, let's say after that we were walking some places just trying to explore the city, and at some point there was like a conflict, and that the group split, and my ex-wife stayed with me. Or yes, I think so. I was sweating a lot during those times because it was so hot and I took off my clothes, and also at some point I had to take care of some baby. Now these events are not exactly chronological, but I'll try to re-mention them when they come. We were walking all together as a group, and then we were doing some random things. We were going up and down hills and whatnot. Eventually we made our way back to the car, and because of something that happened, we split and I continued staying a bit longer in that city, let's say, or like in that place because I wanted some time. At some point there was that thing with the baby, and the mother was telling me to buy it some toys or something, and I was taken aback by that request because how's it my job, and I don't even know what she likes. And then continue continuing on. We went up some steep hills, and I I don't know who was with me, maybe my ex-wife, maybe someone else, and we were listening to some two random people, but I can't recall what the conversation was about exactly, but I think it had to do to do with politics a little bit, and I joke that I'm like a spy. After that, we I I remember something like them furnishing the hill with like money and we slid down it, and then we made our way down, and then there were some people there that we were not exactly very friendly with for some reason. It just seemed like I wanted to fight them. So one of them approached me and like I gave him a quick beating, and he he went back right away, and then the bigger one approached me, and then also took a beating, and then went back, and then the biggest one, I guess, or like their leader also started fighting me. And this was this one was more of a bit of a challenge, like it was a back and forth, but I won. I would say I would say it was just sometimes difficult to access my powers in a way, but I knew I had them and I can completely destroy him. After that, we heard that their army is like having a march in that country, so we went the opposite direction, and I remember I was still naked, at least in this scene, and somehow I made it my I made my way back to the hotel with my with the rest of my friends, so we reunited. One more thing I want to mention that is not really from this scene, but still it was when when I was with all of my friends in the beginning, is that I flew somewhere, like you know, they were walking, and I decided to fly somewhere like a little bit quicker, try to reach there before them. And then Moza was also a little bit my friend, he's called Moza . He was a little bit confused why I'm on my phone all the time, and also some things with him parking the car a bit too close to the pavement. I was afraid I'm gonna hit the car when I open the door, but it turns out it's all fine. I don't know if these are significant, but that's also stuff that happened. Other than that, when I I was going back to the hotel with my ex-wife, I think we were on good terms.
result.cleaned_text: I embarked on a spontaneous multi-location trip with friends and my ex-wife. While traveling, I received a university notification questioning the authenticity of my scientific paper application. During city explorations, our group split after a conflict, leaving me with my ex-wife. The intense heat made me sweat profusely, leading me to remove my clothes. I was unexpectedly tasked with caring for a baby and felt bewildered when asked to buy it toys. We traversed steep hills, overheard a political conversation where I joked about being a spy, and slid down a slope furnished with money. Later, I fought three increasingly larger opponents, struggling initially to access my strength but ultimately defeating them all. Hearing of an approaching army, we fled opposite direction while I remained naked. I reunited with friends at a hotel, where my ex-wife and I were amicable. Earlier, I flew ahead of the group briefly, and my friend Moza questioned my phone usage while parking too close to a curb, sparking momentary door-opening anxiety.

symbols.name: Baby
symbols.description: Unexpectedly tasked with caring for it, bewildered by toy request
symbols.significance: Emerging psychic potential or new life phase demanding nurturance and acceptance of vulnerability

symbols.name: Car
symbols.description: Parked too close to curb by friend Moza, causing door-opening anxiety
symbols.significance: Conscious direction in life; anxiety reflects ego's struggle to navigate transitions

symbols.name: Ex-wife
symbols.description: Travel companion after group conflict; later amicable at hotel
symbols.significance: Represents unresolved feminine aspects and relational patterns from past bonds, requiring reconciliation for psychological growth

symbols.name: Flying
symbols.significance: Transcendent potential and expanded perspective, but temporary due to lack of grounding

symbols.name: Hill
symbols.significance: Symbolic ascent toward consciousness or spiritual challenge requiring effortful progression

symbols.significance: Exposure of authentic self beyond persona defenses, signaling ego surrender for transformation

interpretation.central_theme: The dream portrays an individuation journey where confronting vulnerability and integrating the shadow enables reconciliation with the anima and movement toward psychological wholeness.
interpretation.jungian_analysis: The dream follows a heroic individuation sequence (Scholarly Research), beginning with a spontaneous journey symbolizing the psyche's call to adventure and liberation from containment patterns (Man and His Symbols KB). The university's challenge to the scientific paper represents an authenticity crisis threatening the dreamer's persona—the socially adapted mask now questioned, paralleling scholarly notes on persona rigidity. The group splitting after conflict reflects shadow projection, where disowned traits manifest as external adversaries, echoing The Laws of Human Nature KB on indirect confrontation with aggressors as symbolic shadow work. Intense heat and nakedness signify ego dissolution, stripping away persona defenses to expose core vulnerability, a necessary step for rebirth (Scholarly Research). Caring for the bewildering baby embodies the 'child archetype,' representing nascent psychic potential and the dreamer's unpreparedness for new responsibilities. Sliding down a money-covered slope suggests a descent into unconscious valuations, while battling opponents mirrors shadow integration—initially struggling to access inner strength, then reclaiming disowned power through conflict, resonating with KB passages on fighting aggressors indirectly. Fleeing the army naked underscores collective shadow fears, yet the amicable hotel reunion with the ex-wife signals anima reconciliation, transforming past relational trauma into conscious connection—a process informed by KB insights on limbic bonds in divorce (Change Your Brain KB). Flying briefly symbolizes transcendent potential, though parking anxiety with Moza reveals lingering ego-control issues, emphasizing the need for grounded awareness during inner journeys (Man and His Symbols KB on 'cat watching the mousehole' alertness).
interpretation.waking_life: The dream suggests current tensions: professional integrity challenges (university accusation), unresolved post-divorce dynamics (ex-wife presence), social conflicts (group splitting), and anxiety about new responsibilities (baby care), all demanding shadow integration and anima reconciliation.
interpretation.message: The psyche urges embracing vulnerability as a path to authenticity. Confronting inner conflicts (shadow) and healing relational wounds (anima) will unlock latent strength and guide you toward wholeness. Surrender defensive control to allow emergent potentials to mature.
